---
title: "publications"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: tango
---

[Assessing the relationship between city growth and electricity use over time: A comparative analysis of Chandigarh and Seattle](https://digital.lib.washington.edu/researchworks/handle/1773/26844), University of Washington, 2014


[Public Street and Area Lighting Inventory Phase 1: Survey Results](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8T2r7MVXupGc3JnTDRSazZJX0U/view?usp=sharing), Municipal Solid-State Street Lighting Consortium, Prepared for U.S. Department of Energy, 2014

[Chandigarh Urban Lab, Solar-Spine](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8T2r7MVXupGRXdTaFNxTDAxTE0/view?usp=sharing), University of Washington, 2014
